title: S.R. Batliboi is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: S.R. Batliboi is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
S.R. Batliboi is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Srinagar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About S.R. Batliboi:
S.R. Batliboi is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with S.R. Batliboi!
